Query.Join: WPO.OUTPUT_ID = ( SELECT /*+ PUSH_SUBQ */ MAX (WPO2.OUTPUT_ID) FROM WP_OUTPUT WPO2 WHERE WPO2.EVENT_SEQ = WPO.EVENT_SEQ AND WPO2.PRINTED = 'N' AND WPO2.FINAL_IND = 'Y' AND WPO2.XMLSOURCE IS NOT NULL AND WPO2.USER_ID = WPO.USER_ID ) AND CE.DELETED_FLAG = 'N' AND WPO.EVENT_SEQ = CE.EVENT_SEQ AND RQ.DOCUMENT_ID = WPO.XMLSOURCE
